title: Red Hat Security Advisory: vsftpd security update
overview:
An update for vsftpd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: vsftpd security update

An update for vsftpd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for vsftpd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
vsftpd-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.src.rpm
vsftpd-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.x86_64.rpm
vsftpd-debuginfo-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.x86_64.rpm
vsftpd-debugsource-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.x86_64.rpm
vsftpd-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.s390x.rpm
vsftpd-debuginfo-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.s390x.rpm
vsftpd-debugsource-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.s390x.rpm
vsftpd-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.ppc64le.rpm
vsftpd-debuginfo-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.ppc64le.rpm
vsftpd-debugsource-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.ppc64le.rpm
vsftpd-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.aarch64.rpm
vsftpd-debuginfo-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.aarch64.rpm
vsftpd-debugsource-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-14242: A flaw was found in vsftpd. This vulnerability allows a denial of service (DoS) via an integer overflow in the ls command parameter parsing, triggered by a remote, authenticated attacker sending a crafted STAT command with a specific byte sequence.
